name: Enrow

auth.notes: API key in the x-api-key request header for https://api.enrow.io.

rateLimits: Official product page says up to 50 requests per second. Treat as plan/account dependent unless confirmed in contract or app settings.
pagination: No cursor/page pagination found. Enrow uses async single/bulk jobs: POST creates a job and returns an id, GET retrieves results by id, and webhooks can notify completion. Email bulk endpoint supports up to 5000 searches per batch.
notes: Published: official ReadMe docs expose llms.txt and OpenAPI files for Email Finder and Phone APIs.
No official MCP, CLI, or SDK found.
Main operational risk is credit consumption and processing personal contact data.
